---
title: "DARIAH-EU"
subtitle: "Digital Research Infrastructure for the Arts and Humanities"
toc: true
---

## What is DARIAH?

**DARIAH** (Digital Research Infrastructure for the Arts and Humanities) is a **pan-European research infrastructure** whose mission is to empower arts and humanities research communities with digital methods to create, connect, and share knowledge about culture and society.

::: {.callout-note}
### Legal status
DARIAH was formally established as a **European Research Infrastructure Consortium (ERIC)** on 15 August 2014, by European Commission Decision 2014/239/EU. France is the **host country** of the DARIAH-ERIC secretariat (Paris). As of 2025, DARIAH counts **22 Member States** and several cooperating partners. It is listed on the [ESFRI Roadmap](https://www.esfri.eu/esfri-roadmap) of strategic European research infrastructures.
:::

DARIAH operates as a **distributed network** of national nodes, each contributing expertise, content, tools, and services to a shared infrastructure. It is not a single platform but a **social and technical ecosystem**.

---

## Four Strategic Pillars

| Pillar | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Research** | Supporting digital methods for arts & humanities research — text analysis, data modelling, digital editions, cultural analytics |
| **Education & Training** | Building digital skills across the research community — DARIAH Campus, summer schools, workshops |
| **Advocacy** | Promoting open science and digital humanities in European research policy |
| **Infrastructure** | Developing and maintaining shared technical resources and interoperable services |

---

## Key Tools and Platforms

### DARIAH Campus

An open training platform offering courses, modules, and resources for digital arts and humanities researchers. Free, multilingual, and openly licensed.

🔗 <https://campus.dariah.eu>

---

### SSH Open Marketplace

A discovery portal — co-developed with CLARIN and CESSDA — for tools, services, training materials, workflows, and datasets relevant to the Social Sciences and Humanities. Integrated into EOSC.

🔗 <https://marketplace.sshopencloud.eu>

---

### DARIAH Working Groups

DARIAH's intellectual and methodological work is organised through **open working groups**, accessible to researchers at all DARIAH member institutions. Recent and active groups include:

- **Text and Data Analytics**
- **Digital Methods and Practices Observatory (DiMPO)**
- **Ethics and Legality in the Digital Arts and Humanities (ELDAH)**
- **DARIAH Teach**
- **Women Writers in History**
- **Thesaurus Maintenance**

🔗 Full list: <https://www.dariah.eu/activities/working-groups/>

::: {.callout-tip}
Working groups are an excellent entry point for doctoral students to engage with the European DH community, present early-stage work, and build international networks.
:::

---

## DARIAH and France

France is both a **founding DARIAH member** and the **host country** of the DARIAH-ERIC secretariat. The French national node — **DARIAH-FR** — is managed by Huma-Num. This means:

- French researchers access DARIAH services primarily through Huma-Num
- Huma-Num coordinates French participation in DARIAH working groups
- NAKALA, Isidore, and other Huma-Num services feed into the DARIAH ecosystem

---

## DARIAH and UNITA Countries

Most UNITA partner countries are connected to DARIAH in some capacity:

| Country | DARIAH status | National node / contact |
|---------|--------------|------------------------|
| 🇫🇷 France | Founding member · **host country** | Huma-Num (DARIAH-FR) |
| 🇮🇹 Italy | Founding member | CNR-ILC (DARIAH-IT) |
| 🇪🇸 Spain | Member | RedIRIS (DARIAH-ES) |
| 🇵🇹 Portugal | Member | FCSH/NOVA (DARIAH-PT) |
| 🇷🇴 Romania | Member | UEFISCDI (DARIAH-RO) |
| 🇨🇭 Switzerland | **Cooperating partner** (DARIAH-CH in progress) | SAHSS / EPFL / UniNE |
| 🇺🇦 Ukraine | **Cooperating partner** | Chernivtsi National University |

Switzerland is building a DARIAH-CH national consortium under the DESIR programme, with eight partner institutions, in order to apply for full membership. Ukraine participates as a cooperating partner.

→ Your institution's national node — or cooperating partner structure — is your entry point to DARIAH resources, working groups, and events.

---

## Annual Events

DARIAH organises a flagship **Annual Event** each year, bringing together the global DH community. The 2026 edition takes place in **Rome, Italy** (26–29 May 2026).

🔗 <https://www.dariah.eu/activities/events-and-activities/>
